reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar que lamentablemente cerro su solón parrilla, (muy caro además)

(Translated by Google)
Nice place that unfortunately closed its grill area (very expensive too).

como siempre el aca se destaca en todos sus servicios

(Translated by Google)
As always, the ACA excels in all its services.

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy simple pero cumple con el cometido de poder estar un rato Sentado en una mesa tal vez haciendo un picnic o descansando de la ruta comiendo algo tomando un café

(Translated by Google)
It's a very simple place, but it serves its purpose: you can sit at a table for a while, maybe having a picnic or resting from your journey, eating something and having a coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1a05EWDFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre q vamos a Mardel hacemos la parada ahí, la factura la mejor y por ser socios del ACA te hacen descuentos por todo lo que compres, buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we go to Mar del Plata we make a stop there, the bill is the best and as members of the ACA they give you discounts on everything you buy, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURadDRTSjVRRRAB
